induction L generalizing i with
  | nil =>
    simp [List.partialSums]
  | cons l L ih =>
    by_cases hli : i ≤ l.length
    · have hfi : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length (l :: L)).partialSums = 1 := by
        simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, hli]
        rw [findIdx_eq] <;> grind
      simp [flatten_cons, take_append, hli, hfi, Nat.sub_eq_zero_of_le hli]
    · have hlt : l.length < i := Nat.lt_of_not_ge hli
      have hfi :
          findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length (l :: L)).partialSums =
            findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (map length L).partialSums + 1 := by
        simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, Function.comp_def, hlt, Nat.not_lt_zero]
        congr
        funext x
        grind
      have ht : l.take i = l := by
        apply take_eq_of_length_le
        exact Nat.le_of_lt hlt
      have hdrop : i - l.length = (i - l.length) := rfl
      simp only [flatten_cons, take_append, ht, Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.le_of_lt hlt)]
      simp only [hfi]
      simp only [List.take, Nat.succ_sub_one, Nat.add_sub_cancel_left, Nat.sub_self, List.take]
      simpa [flatten_cons, take_cons, Nat.succ_sub_one] using ih (i := i - l.length)
